title: Scalpel grass
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Scalpel grass''' was a sharp-edged grass native to the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy]]. [[Yuuzhan Vong]] grew them around prisons to prevent escape.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
